special_mechanics.name: Fighting Game Combat
special_mechanics.description: Turn-based fighting game with limited move sets per character. ECO35-2 cyborg player character confronts Supervisor's minions across Electrocorp facilities

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains no quantitative movement physics parameters, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system details. Source focuses on gameplay narrative, development history, and critical reception rather than technical physics specifications. Fighting game genre with pre-rendered graphics technology noted but no movement mechanics documented.
